name: recovery-law-group

certifications: Also operates as Wajda Law Group
Focuses on debt resolution and bankruptcy

best_for: Consumers needing combined bankruptcy and debt settlement legal services from a single firm
Individuals facing creditor lawsuits who need attorney representation and defense
Those considering Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy who want legal guidance on alternatives
People in financial distress who want attorney-backed debt negotiation with settlement option
description_short: Recovery Law Group (Wajda Law Group) is an Indiana-based law firm specializing in bankruptcy and debt relief. Founded 2018. Offices in Anderson, IN and Los Angeles. 4.7 average from 245 reviews. Not BBB rated.
description_long:
Recovery Law Group, also known as Wajda Law Group, is a law firm headquartered in Anderson, Indiana, with additional offices including Los Angeles, specializing in bankruptcy protection and debt relief services. Founded in 2018, the firm provides legal representation for consumers in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy filings as well as debt settlement and negotiation services. The firm claims to have helped approximately 150,000 clients, though this number should be verified against actual case volume. Reviews across platforms average approximately 4.7 stars from 245 reviews on Reviews.io.

The firm offers a range of debt-related legal services including Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing, Chapter 13 bankruptcy reorganization, debt settlement and negotiation, creditor harassment cessation, foreclosure defense, and wage garnishment protection. The law firm structure provides advantages over non-attorney debt settlement companies, including attorney-client privilege, the ability to represent clients in court if creditors pursue litigation, and legal oversight of the entire debt resolution process.

The company is not BBB accredited and has no BBB rating. Customer reviews are mixed — while Reviews.io shows strong scores (4.72 from 245 reviews with 232 excellent ratings), Yelp reviews (44 reviews in LA) show more varied experiences including complaints about taking money without completing services. The firm's Indiana headquarters with an LA satellite office is an unusual geographic setup for a consumer-facing law firm. Consumers should verify attorney licensing in their specific state and request references from recent clients in their jurisdiction before engaging.

Consumers considering bankruptcy should also explore alternatives. Debt relief programs may negotiate settlements for less than owed, while debt consolidation loans can simplify payments into one monthly bill. Credit counseling agencies offer free financial assessments and debt management plans. After bankruptcy, rebuilding credit through secured credit cards and credit builder loans provides a structured path back. Credit repair services can help ensure the bankruptcy filing is accurately reported and outdated items are removed on schedule. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility during the multi-year recovery process.
diagnosis: Recovery Law Group offers combined bankruptcy and debt settlement legal services, which can be valuable for consumers who need both options evaluated by an attorney. The Reviews.io profile (4.7 stars, 245 reviews) is positive, but the lack of BBB rating and mixed Yelp reviews are caution flags. The Indiana headquarters with LA satellite raises questions about where attorneys are actually licensed to practice. Verify: (1) attorney bar admission in your state, (2) fee structure in writing, (3) references from recent clients. Compare against local bankruptcy attorneys and national firms like Allmand Law (Texas) or Weston Legal.
pros: Attorney-led debt relief provides legal representation that non-attorney settlement firms cannot offer
Bankruptcy filing capability gives consumers a legal option when settlement is insufficient
Free consultation allows evaluation of legal options without upfront financial commitment
cons: No BBB accreditation or rating found, limiting third-party accountability verification
Dual operating names (Recovery Law Group / Wajda Law Group) can create confusion about the entity providing services
Limited online transparency about attorney credentials, case outcomes, and fee structures
Anderson, Indiana location may limit in-person consultation accessibility for consumers in other states
services: Attorney-led debt settlement and creditor negotiation
Free legal consultation for debt relief options
Credit counseling and financial recovery planning
